tickets.title: Checkout fails with international credit cards
tickets.description: Users with international cards cannot complete purchases. Error 'Payment Gateway Timeout' after 30 seconds.
tickets.business_impact: High - Direct loss of international sales

tickets.title: Search returns incorrect results
tickets.description: Product search algorithm returning irrelevant items since last deploy.
tickets.business_impact: Medium - Affects conversion and user experience

tickets.title: XSS vulnerability in contact forms
tickets.description: Potential XSS vulnerability detected in contact forms and product comments.

tickets.title: Shopping cart empties randomly
tickets.description: Users report carts emptying after 30+ minutes of browsing. Session management issue suspected.
tickets.business_impact: Critical - Direct sales loss and user frustration
